benefits: Conyza neolaxiflora, also known as the Chinese fleabane, has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its potential health benefits. Research suggests that it may possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. intro: Conyza neolaxiflora, also known as Korean conyza or Korean fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The bioactive constituents of Conyza neolaxiflora include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Conyza neolaxiflora is commonly used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into traditional herbal remedies such as tinctures and poultices.
